name: ShowDoc
description: Lightweight online API and technical documentation tool popular with Chinese IT teams; open-source.

seo.title: ShowDoc — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: ShowDoc: Lightweight online API and technical documentation tool popular with Chinese IT teams; open-source.

when_to_use: OSS API documentation for Chinese IT development teams
Self-hosted technical docs with API spec integration
Lightweight wiki for internal API reference documentation
Collaborative documentation for Chinese enterprise teams
Open-source Confluence alternative for API docs

review.verdict: Fine lightweight OSS API docs tool if you're in the Chinese ecosystem, otherwise Mintlify or Redoc win.
review.best_for: Chinese dev teams self-hosting simple API docs
review.not_for: International teams wanting polished OpenAPI tooling
